summary: RBAC Admin Module Testing Complete - 16/16 backend tests passed, all frontend flows verified. Fixed bug in GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/permissions endpoint.

fixed.issue: Returned 404 'User not found' for existing users without module_permissions field due to MongoDB projection returning empty dict
fixed.fix: Removed projection from find_one query to properly check user existence

backend: 5. test_admin_login_non_admin_user - Rejects regular user trying admin login
9. test_get_admin_users_list - GET /api/admin/users returns users with module_permissions
13. test_admin_user_has_all_permissions - Admin has all module permissions
frontend: 1. Admin Login gate at /admin shows AdminLogin form when not authenticated
2. Admin Login with correct credentials shows AdminCenter
3. Admin Login with wrong credentials shows error message
4. Module Access tab displays all users with toggle switches for 5 modules
5. Toggle switches present for: Matchmaker, Assessment, DRHP, Funding, Valuation
6. Admin Center link visible in sidebar for admin users
7. Admin Center link hidden from non-admin users
8. Regular user accessing /drhp sees Access Denied page
9. Regular user accessing /funding sees Access Denied page
10. Regular user accessing /valuation sees Access Denied page
11. Regular user CAN access /assessment (allowed by default)
12. Regular user CAN access /matchmaker (allowed by default)
13. /access-denied route renders AccessDenied page with data-testid='access-denied-page'
14. Dashboard module cards link to correct paths (/drhp, /funding, /matchmaker, /assessment)

admin_login_gate.description: /admin shows AdminLogin form when not admin authenticated, then AdminCenter after login

admin_credentials.description: Admin login with admin@ipolabs.com / admin@123 works correctly

module_access_tab.description: AdminCenter 'Module Access' tab displays users with toggle switches for 5 modules

auth_me_fields.description: GET /api/auth/me returns is_admin and module_permissions fields

access_enforcement.description: Users without module permissions redirected to Access Denied page

sidebar_admin_visibility.description: Admin Center link hidden from non-admin users in sidebar

dashboard_paths.description: Dashboard module cards link to real paths (/drhp, /funding, etc.) not /drhp1, /funding1

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py line 4916 - MongoDB projection with only module_permissions field returned empty dict for users without that field, causing false 404
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC system fully tested. Admin login gate at /admin works. Module Access tab in AdminCenter shows all users with toggle switches for 5 modules (matchmaker, assessment, drhp, funding, valuation). Default permissions: assessment=true, matchmaker=true, drhp=false, funding=false, valuation=false. Admin users have all permissions=true. ModuleRoute component enforces access - users without permission see AccessDenied page. Fixed bug in GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/permissions where MongoDB projection caused false 404.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/permissions returned 404 'User not found' for existing users
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: MongoDB find_one with projection {module_permissions: 1} returns empty dict {} when user exists but doesn't have module_permissions field. Python evaluates empty dict as falsy, so 'if not target' was True, raising 404.
reproduction_steps: 1. Have a user in database without module_permissions field
3. Backend returns 404 'User not found' even though user exists
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Removed projection from find_one query - now fetches full user document to properly check existence, then extracts module_permissions with default fallback
